# sparrow-benches

Criterion performance benchmark crate for SparrowDB.
No binary; only `[[bench]]` targets + a thin `src/lib.rs` for shared fixture helpers.
Feature flags: `cpu` (default — no live DB), `http` (future — requires running container).

## Purpose

Establishes measurable baselines for the three CPU-hot paths and catches regressions
on every PR via a `critcmp` diff posted as a GitHub Actions annotation.

## Benchmark targets

### compiler (`benches/compiler.rs`)

Exercises the HQL compiler pipeline without any LMDB or network involvement.

Groups:
- `compiler/parse`   — `SparrowParser::parse_source(content)` only
- `compiler/analyze` — `analyze(source)` on an already-parsed AST
- `compiler/full`    — parse + analyze round-trip

Inputs: a static HQL schema + three queries defined in `src/lib.rs::HQL_SOURCE`.
No DB, no arena allocation beyond the parse tree.

Baseline (macOS M-series): parse ~62 µs, analyze ~7 µs, full ~69 µs.

### traversal (`benches/traversal.rs`)

Seeds a fixture graph into a tempfile-backed LMDB env once per group (not per
iteration), then benchmarks graph walk operations.

Groups:
- `traversal/n_from_type/small`  — scan 100 "person" nodes
- `traversal/n_from_type/medium` — scan 10 000 "person" nodes
- `traversal/out_node/small`     — single-hop out-edge walk, 100-node chain graph
- `traversal/out_node/medium`    — single-hop out-edge walk, 10 000-node chain graph

Key implementation note: seeding uses `seed_graph()` from `src/lib.rs`, which bypasses
the traversal-iterator API (`add_n`/`add_edge`) and writes directly to LMDB with
`put()` (not `PutFlags::APPEND`). This avoids `MDB_KEYEXIST` panics caused by
`v6_uuid()` generating non-monotonic u128 values in rapid succession.
See `docs/superpowers/known-issues.md` for the full write-up.

Baseline: n_from_type/small ~3 µs, medium ~264 µs; out_node/small ~32 µs, medium ~5 ms.

### write_pipeline (`benches/write_pipeline.rs`)

Measures record encoding independently of LMDB commit latency.

Groups:
- `write_pipeline/serialize/{1,100,1000,10000}`   — `Node::to_bincode_bytes()` per node in batch
- `write_pipeline/deserialize/{1,100,1000,10000}` — `Node::from_bincode_bytes()` per blob in batch

Setup (node construction, pre-serialisation) is outside `b.iter()`.
The deserialize closure returns `black_box(count)` (XOR of node IDs) rather than
`Vec<Node>` to satisfy Rust's lifetime rules on `Node<'arena>`.

Baseline: serialize/1 ~15 ns, serialize/10000 ~101 µs; deserialize/1 ~20 ns, deserialize/10000 ~102 µs.

## Shared fixture helpers (`src/lib.rs`)

- `make_engine() -> (SparrowGraphEngine, TempDir)` — creates a 1 GB LMDB env in a temp dir.
- `seed_graph(storage, node_count) -> Vec<u128>` — inserts `node_count` "person" nodes in a chain
  connected by "knows" edges. Returns sorted node IDs. Bypasses `add_n`/`add_edge` (see above).
- `HQL_SOURCE: &str` — static HQL schema with Person nodes, Knows edges, and three queries.
- `make_content(src) -> Content` — wraps a raw HQL string into the `Content` type for `SparrowParser`.

## Baseline management

Baselines live in `crates/sparrow-benches/baselines/` as committed criterion JSON files.
Criterion names dirs after benchmark IDs with `/` replaced by `_`
(e.g. `compiler_parse/main/estimates.json`, `write_pipeline_serialize/1000/main/estimates.json`).

Update workflow:
  `make bench-update`  — run benches, copy JSONs to baselines/, stage with git add
  `git commit -m "perf(benches): update baselines"`

Compare workflow:
  `make bench-diff`    — restore baselines → target/criterion/, run benches as "current", critcmp diff

## CI

`.github/workflows/bench.yml` — triggers on PRs touching `crates/sparrow-benches/**` or `crates/sparrow-core/**`.
Restores committed baselines, runs benchmarks as "current", posts `critcmp main current` diff
as a PR comment. Non-blocking (informational only).

## Imports

All sparrow-core types are imported as `use sparrow_db::...` (lib name override; package name is `sparrow-core`).
Key paths used by benches:
- `sparrow_db::sparrow_engine::traversal_core::ops::g::G`
- `sparrow_db::sparrow_engine::traversal_core::ops::source::n_from_type::NFromTypeAdapter`
- `sparrow_db::sparrow_engine::traversal_core::ops::out::out::OutAdapter`
- `sparrow_db::sparrowc::parser::SparrowParser`
- `sparrow_db::sparrowc::analyzer::analyze`
- `sparrow_db::utils::items::{Node, Edge}`
- `sparrow_db::utils::id::v6_uuid`
- `sparrow_db::utils::label_hash::hash_label`
- `sparrow_db::sparrow_engine::storage_core::SparrowGraphStorage`
